Log.Location: "Proctor Valley Rd / San Miguel Ranch Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[12] [Notification] [CHP]-ADAM FORMM SWEETWATER ADV ROAD IS OPEN/ WAS ONLY CLOSED FOR 10 MINS"
"[11] LEFT MSG W/ RP TO CONFIRM IF THIS AREA IS STILL CLOSED"
"[10] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from CHAINS-Chain Control to CLOSURE of a Road by CHP"
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from CLOSURE of a Road to 1125-Traffic Hazard by CHP"
"[3] TRAFFIC CONTROL IS SET UP FOR WHEN CLOSURE IS IN PLACE -- JUST NEED OFCR AND CT TO SET UP CLOSURE"
"[2] WATER MAIN BROKE ON THE BRIDGE JSO SAN MIGUEL RANCH ROAD -- NEED ROAD CLOSURE FROM SAN MIGUEL TO BONITA MEADOWS LANE "
"[1] [Intersection: Proctor Valley Rd / San Miguel Ranch Rd] [Medium] [Information] BORDERLINE CALL, ROLL CHP AND START CVPD FOR BORDERLINE"
"[3] BOTH VEHS ON RS // DECL MEDICS // REQ CHP FOR 1110"
"[2] DGRY TOYT SIENNA VS BLU AUDI SD"
"[7] VV: VEH STILL DRIVEABLE // REQ 1110 // WILL BE 1023'ING AT 7891 Whitaker St, Buena Park, CA 90621 // MAJX OF AUTO CENTER/STANTON"
"[5] RP ADV'D AIRBAGS DEPLOYED IN HIS VEH // CONTINUING TO DRIVE // ADV'D MULT TIMES TO NOT FOLLOW SV"
"[2] BIG RIG PLT ON TRLR 1VZ1820 MATSON"
"[1] BIG RIG W/ TRLR VS 15FT WHI/GRN BOX TK"
